channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: ‘Island surrounded by war’: Crimeans panic amid Ukrainian attacks
item.description: Fuel shortages and fears rise in Crimea as Kyiv attacks the annexed peninsula.

item.title: ‘Netanyahu’s life project failed with US-Iran deal’
item.description: ‘Netanyahu’s life project failed with US-Iran deal’

item.title: Iran, US agree tentative deal to ‘end war’: Your questions answered
item.description: Uncertainty remains over whether Israel will honour the agreement.

item.title: Video shows man shot by Israeli drone while sitting with others in Gaza
item.description: Video shows man shot by Israeli drone while sitting with others in Gaza.

item.title: UK announces social media ban for under-16s
item.description: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer says the UK will ban social media for teens under the age of 16.

item.title: World Cup racism monitor urges FIFA to remove VAR official over gesture
item.description: Fare network calls for Australian VAR official Shaun Evans to be removed from World Cup 2026 after 'OK' symbol on camera

item.title: World Cup 2026: Spain vs Cape Verde prediction, schedules, latest news
item.description: Spain, Belgium, Uruguay and Iran begin their campaigns as off-field stories also shape the World Cup.

item.title: UK Court of Appeal upholds ban on Palestine Action as ‘terrorist’ group
item.description: Judge says the group's behaviour was not that of a non-violent, direct action organisation.

item.title: Geneva police use force as G7 protest escalates into violence
item.description: Demonstrators denounce G7 amid escalating clashes, which lead to damaged buildings and burning cars.

item.title: Kyiv cathedral burns as heavy Russian air raids hit Ukraine
item.description: Flames engulf Kyiv-Pechersk Lavra's Dormition Cathedral, a UNESCO site, following Russia's intensified military assault.

item.title: Britain announces sweeping social media ban for under-16s
item.description: PM warns social media platforms are exposing children to content that is 'dangerous' and 'designed to be addictive'.

item.title: The slow death of Goldsmiths is a warning to British universities
item.description: The crisis at the London university shows how marketisation has pushed UK higher education to the brink.

item.title: Stanford graduates stage pro-Palestine walkout at Google CEO speech
item.description: Stanford University graduates walked out during Google CEO Sundar Pichai’s commencement address.

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 4: Germany routs Curacao; Netherlands draw with Japan
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: Seafarers’ advocates welcome US-Iran deal after months-long limbo in Gulf
item.description: Some 20,000 crew members have been stranded for months amid the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Pakistani police mistakenly open fire on Australian family, killing child
item.description: Fatal shooting of nine-year-old Hania Ahmed by Punjab Police officer causes furore.

item.title: How Trump is relaunching a tariff war citing ‘forced labour’ concerns
item.description: Trade analysts predict Trump’s latest push could accelerate the 'reorientation' of global trade away from the US.

item.title: El-Geneina’s struggle: Life amid Sudan war and humanitarian challenges
item.description: El-Geneina residents face soaring food and water costs as aid struggles to meet the needs of displaced families.

item.title: G7 meeting in France: What’s on agenda, who is attending?
item.description: The war in Iran, Ukraine and economic challenges are expected to be a key part of the agenda.

item.title: Stepson of Norway’s crown prince jailed for four years in rape case
item.description: Marius Borg Hoiby, 29, convicted of rape, domestic violence and drug charges after seven-week trial in Oslo.

item.title: Trump hails MoU with Iran despite misgivings from some Republicans
item.description: Trump hails MoU with Iran despite misgivings from some Republicans.

item.title: What still needs to be negotiated in US-Iran ‘peace deal’?
item.description: The US and Iran say they have reached a deal. Al Jazeera’s Osama Bin Javaid explains how both sides are claiming victory

item.title: Iran war day 108: Iran, US reach a tentative deal to end conflict
item.description: US President Donald Trump and Iranian leaders say a deal has been agreed to end more than 100 days of war.

item.title: US and Iran announce ‘understanding’ to end the war
item.description: The US and Iran have announced a memorandum of understanding to end the war and re-open the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Russian attacks in Ukraine kill 11, damage historic Kyiv cathedral
item.description: A large overnight missile and drone attack strikes Kyiv, Kharkiv and other Ukrainian cities.
